Tuolumne Meadows · Yosemite National Park

Young Lakes

Three alpine lakes set in granite at about 9,900 feet, tucked under Ragged Peak in the Yosemite high country north of Tuolumne Meadows.

Tap a day to fly the route. Switch map layers top right. Grab the GPX below.

tiles slow, switched base layer

Elevation profile

13.6 mi loop · 8,595 ft to 9,950 ft at camp · Ragged Peak side trip 10,912 ft
✦ Dark skies at basecamp

Camp sits at 9,900 feet with no light pollution. On a clear night the Milky Way is right overhead, so bring a pad and stay up for it.

The plan, day by day

Two nights are pure basecamp and the side trips are optional. Tap any day to fly the map to it.

The high country

A few shots from along the way.

Built for planning. Check current conditions and the Ragged Peak scramble against NPS info before you go.
